configurePresets.name: msvc
configurePresets.description: Normal multi-config MSVC build with Debug/Release/RelWithDebInfo/MinSizeRel.

configurePresets.name: msvc-pgo-generate
configurePresets.description: Release build instrumented for PGO training. Run the app/plugin in typical scenarios after building this preset.

configurePresets.name: msvc-pgo-use
configurePresets.description: Release build optimized with profile data collected by msvc-pgo-generate.

configurePresets.name: clangd-msvc
configurePresets.description: Generates build-clangd/compile_commands.json for clangd without touching the normal MSVC build directory.
